About

Scriptwriter's instinct,
marketer's discipline.

Content marketing professional with 5+ years across brand campaigns and broadcast storytelling. I've produced YouTube and IG Reels campaign content for Hang Seng Bank, Chinachem Group and G-SHOCK, with content accumulating 105,000+ views on a single video.

My background is unusual for marketing — I spent years as a TV drama scriptwriter, rising to Script Editor (編審) on a Tencent × TVB production. That training in audience psychology, narrative pacing and deadline-driven collaboration is exactly what I bring to brand content: an understanding of why people keep watching.

  • 376,000+ combined viewsScripted a Hang Seng Bank YouTube series with production scheduling and on-set supervision
  • 5 brand clientsEnd-to-end content delivery across banking, property, watches, wine and eyewear
  • Promoted within one yearScriptwriter to Script Editor at 77 Atelier, on senior management's recommendation

Where I've worked

2023 – 2026

77 Atelier Limited

Script Editor (編審) — promoted from Scriptwriter, Sept 2024 · departed on contract completion

Social Big Data / Data Metas

Copywriter

  • Wrote video scripts for one of Hang Seng Bank's YouTube channel series; managed production schedules and on-set supervision, with content accumulating 105,000+ views
  • Managed GGO's IG Reels campaign from client brief to final edit — copywriting, video scripts and the full production pipeline
  • Supported new business pitching: developed campaign concepts and presented content strategies to prospective clients
